title: chore(secrets): sync MUSIC_SERVICE_URL to https tunnel endpoint
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Tunnel Vision
gist.blurb: Synced up our internal secrets for the music service to point to the shiny new secure tunnel. Keeping the tunes flowing without interruption!
gist.summary: Synchronized the local encrypted secrets for the music service URL with the production environment to prevent accidental regressions.
gist.impact: Ensures the ACE-Step music generation service remains stable and accessible by properly routing through the new dedicated tunnel.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together in a cozy digital tunnel, handling glowing musical notes and secret keys to represent the secure music service routing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny miner's hardhat, flying through a glowing lime green (#ecf874) digital tunnel. She is carrying a glowing musical note towards a chunky retro server. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
